prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Neighbor Who Babysat Too Much
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Hallmark Possession Event
Tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
Theme: Trust isn't given. It's rented.
Omen: phone static saying her name
Relationship dynamic: emotionally neglected marriage
Props: blood-adjacent tea towel, unopened letter, scarf with impossible timing

Cast:
- Wyatt Bell | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=architect | threat_aura=0.19 | space=old family office described as retreat supplies | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Wyatt Hawthorne | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=family practice physician | threat_aura=0.41 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=covered for someone out of shame; ignored a warning text on the worst possible night
- Evelyn Dane | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=bartender who knows everybody's business | threat_aura=0.39 | space=marina tackle room described as old family things | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Evelyn Pike | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=widow with a foundation | threat_aura=0.72 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=inherited documents she should have burned
- Cole Bennett | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=regional dentist | threat_aura=0.71 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=was in the wrong county on the wrong night; has a storage unit he refuses to explain
- Brooke Dane | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=boutique owner | threat_aura=0.51 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Gavin Bennett | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Noah Pike | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Wyatt Hawthorne is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Wyatt Bell says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Bellweather.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Wyatt?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Gavin. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Wyatt. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The blood-adjacent tea towel is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Evelyn."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
